scope: Local S2PMT03 B-011 remediation evidence for M4 cycle watermark behavior under M2 failure, M3 timeout, missing terminal mail, late terminal data after finalized watermark, rerun idempotence, and cross-cycle leakage.
non_scope: No real SMTP send, scheduler, Release, production restore, DB migration, public schema change, production queue mutation, ranking, source adapter change, live source fetch, V7.1/V7.2 contract edit, P0/P1 closure claim, DAILY_OPERATION, or integrated production acceptance.
local_gates: M2 FAILED after deadline degrades M4
M3 TIMEOUT after deadline degrades M4
Missing terminal mail before deadline waits and remains retry-safe
Missing terminal mail after deadline finalizes degraded watermark
Late terminal data after finalized watermark is ignored and recorded
Same inputs rerun to the same watermark object
Cross-cycle terminal mail blocks readiness and degrades after deadline
validation: source/board user-center root gate regression: 14 OK
